## Workflow Renderer embeds models it needed in workflow data, allowing for easy chaining of Renderer nodes and reusing of loaded models.
## You can use Relay to make quick changes

## Execute the builder node ▶️ to pull data from prior nodes.  You can make any changes and then lock the section, so changes are maintained when the workflow is executed.
## You can connect Lora_Stacks, Prompts and Seeds from external sources.  When used, these will overide the data in wofklow_data.

groups.title: Use Relay Node to modify or extract Workflow Data.
Builder nodes can be daisy chained.
Builder can also be used Standlone if no Extractor is connected
Finally, Save your results with Recipe Manager
